attacking_style: Attacks immediately after climb crests when pure sprinters are distanced, exploiting transition moments when stronger climbers have dropped fast finishers but haven't fully recovered.
team_tactics: Limited data on team support; appears to make opportunistic selections when racing naturally fragments rather than through orchestrated team-led setups.
terrain_preference: Punchy uphill finishes that eliminate pure sprinters but aren't steep enough for specialist climbers; excels in reduced bunch scenarios with 10-30 riders remaining.
vulnerability: Cannot win from small group sprints even after making difficult selections; lacks top-end sprint speed when matched against similar rider types in final 200m.
key_patterns: Attacks at climb crests targeting transition moments when sprinters dropped (2 observations)
Makes final selections but loses in small-group sprints, positioning or speed deficit (2 observations)
Targets situations where pure sprinters eliminated but group still too large for solo
form_trajectory: neutral: Made key selection at 2023 Giro but sprint weakness persists from 2022; no improvement in finishing ability despite selection strength
